title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Not sure if my feet grew... :)
reviews.text: I'm 55 and normally wear a 11.5 regular so that's what I ordered. My toes were super scrunched up and hitting the tip of the shoe, so I had to return them and order a half size up. They seem narrow in the front to me. Aside from that IMO they look better in the pics than in person but for the price I'm not going to complain too much. Seems like a solid shoe otherwise. The inserts seem to be glued in which is a bummer because I use orthotic inserts especially in my running shoes.

reviews.title: Who'd,thunk....these could be so comfortable
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics for several years now and have been pleased. They do not last very long but they are comfortable and at about $50 per pair (always buy on sale) it is much cheaper then other name brands. I thought I would try the mid tops as I used to wear hightops in my early years. I am glad I did, they are very comfortable. So good that I just ordered a second pair (grey) as soon as I tried these coffee (brown) ones on. The grey ones are on sale for just $40 so its a no-brainer.

reviews.title: High top Asics
reviews.text: I've worn Asics for ever and was actually skeptical about buying since other reviewers that where Asics gave poor reviews. Well, in glad I bought them. I have always wanted Asics to make a high top and they finally did. These will make great trail shoes. I'm returning a pair of Merrells that didn't fit like old Merrells did. The Asics have built in stability for people with high arches. They are lightweight,  comfortable and fit like good shoes should. Asics didn't drop the bar as others complained, looks like the same high quality at reasonable prices they are known for.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

title: Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Smooth roads are ahead when you put on the Ghost 14. This award-winning runner favorite now features 100% DNA LOFT in the midsole, for a softer, smoother ride. We’ve also improved the fit so the shoe adjusts even more comfortably to your foot.
features: THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Brooks has lost a step on wear/quality, but still a very good shoe
reviews.text:
First, Brooks is a top running shoe manufacturer, and I always like buying their products, and they are to be applauded for releasing shoes in widths, which lets you get a shoe that fits, which is essential. If a shoe does not fit properly, then it will be extremely difficult to run (or walk any distance in). The Brooks Glycerin is one model up from the Ghost, that has better cushioning, but is no longer available in a Narrow width, and is more expensive, but the Ghost is a pretty good shoe on its own. I would have given the Ghost 5 stars, but the Ghost 14 is not quite perfect, having two areas where it could be better (and was better previously).

The first picture shows a Ghost 14 (on the left), next to a Ghost 13 (the previous model, on the right), and you can see the Ghost 14 has less tread, so wears out sooner, I would say roughly 50-75 miles of road (asphalt) running. The picture shows both shoes new. The Ghost 13 also was a little more cushioned, but you can offset that some by putting a different insole in the 14, and a lot of runners replace the insoles anyway. The thinner tread means less mileage on the 14s, but still probably as good as most of the competition, just no longer better here.

The second pictures shows the upper collar on a Ghost 14, and the fabric Brooks is using there (not so much on the 13 and earlier models) is nice and soft, but does not hold up. I generally see holes or failures at the top of the lace area, and on some shoes, towards the back collar area. You get a lot of fraying, sometimes holes, which is more an appearance problem than anything that would impact running in them, but means also you cannot wear them casually, at least where someone might see the failures. That may be an aspect that is supply chain related, they used to hold up better, but I have seen the problem on two pair of Ghost 14s, and other manufacturers do a bit better (probably needs a bit more nylon, to hold up longer).

I will say that the Ghost 14 has a narrower tongue at the top, that is shared with the 13 but was new there, and I have not seen it much in other shoes, but actually works very well, so I give kudos to Brooks on that design innovation. There is less chance that during a run the tongue will shift over into the forefoot, at least in a painful way, and you don't have to stop to shift it back.

So overall, particularly at this price point, the Brooks continues to be good value and one of the top shoes to consider, but as with anything, there are a couple of areas that could use further improvement.

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

reviews.title: Great support
reviews.text: I am not a runner but am on my feet all day. These are very supportive and very comfortable. I used to tweak the Ghosts and decided to give these a try and am so happy I did.

I hope brooks will not mess with this because it’s perfect. They ruined Adrenalines with the 22, which became uncomfortable this year.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Cumulus 24 Running Shoes
description: The GEL-CUMULUS 24 (Wide) shoe is a versatile everyday trainer for various runners covering different distances. From the upper to the foam underfoot, this shoe feels softer and more responsive. To improve comfort, the upper features an improved heel fit. Meanwhile, the engineered mesh improves breathability to keep your feet cool throughout your run. This smooth distance trainer is also updated with our FF BLAST cushioning. It helps create a softer landing and a more responsive toe-off.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
FF BLAST cushioning: Creates lightweight impact absorption and a responsive energy return.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Gender-specific 3D SPACE CONSTRUCTION feature addresses different compression rates:
Engineered mesh upper: Improves breathability.
Reflective accents: Improves visibility in low-light conditions.

reviews.title: No more shin splints/heel pain

reviews.title: Great for bad joints
reviews.text: These are great for joint and back pain. I’m on my feet all day and they’re like a firm cloud!  I tried the nimbus but they seemed too soft for hard surfaces. The were so cushiony but I could feel the hard floor in the ball of my foot so I use them for walking in nature and these for harder surfaces. Size up a half. I wear 9.5 Asics but for nimbus and cumulus I had to go to 10

reviews.title: Asics has changed
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics Gel Kayano running shoes  for many years.  This is the first time I have had a complaint.  They are no sized correctly.  Every time I wear them my back hurts.  When I put them up against the pair I am replacing the new ones are not the same size.  I missed the return period because I kept thinking they would be okay.  As it is I have 2 pair of shoes that I spent over $200 on and cannot wear them.

reviews.title: TREAT IT LIKE A SOCK
reviews.text:
PROS: Lightweight; very soft rubber soles (I would say strictly intended for inside use if you want them to last); and extremely comfortable.
CONS: Laces are too long (I replaced with "Lock Laces"); there's a learning curve to putting them on so as to avoid pulled muscles, damaged back, dislocated shoulder. Think about how you put on socks, then practice. These are not "shoes."

reviews.title: Very nice comfortable shoes
reviews.text: I like them very much, stylish, lots of compliments.  Color is perfect. (light Blue)

reviews.title: It's okay!
reviews.text:
These are based off the famous shoe from the other brand , it rhymes with Beezy450, which costs $100s of dollars! They are just a sock mesh put into a mold, where hot rubber is poured into the bottom which makes the sole. Put in a soft insole and boom, you got a foam runner shoe. Well these shoes are the same thing as the big brand, just without any logos.
The fit is not good for wide feet. They are only good for narrow and normal. If your feet is identical to the mold that they use for generic sizes, then it will fit you perfect and be very comfortable.
These are casual shoes and won't be great for dedicated sports like basketball or cross-country. 5-stars for being a great alternative to big name brands and for being very affordable. I can't think of anything bad to say about this shoe.

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: These shoes are lightweight, trendy & comfortable. Most shoes don't have all 3 for me. The price is great and are better than some of the tip brands out there. I definitely recommend these shoes. The quality is better than I expected.

reviews.title: Fit was expected
reviews.text: These are comparable to my name-brand sneakers. They fit well and are comfortable to wear, I'm very pleased with them and recommend them.

Durable density foam midsole with a lower heel to toe drop provide lightweight and propulsive power.

reviews.title: Buy a Size Larger

Surprising. This is not a road shoe by any stretch of the imagination. I've been switching from heel toe stride to mid foot striker. Not comfortable enough and minimal cushioning
This at best is for walking.
Also tight in the toe box. Kind of surprising. I will not be buying more of these
Also oddly they came in plastic wrap. No box. Cosmetic but just odd

reviews.title: Size down 1/2 a size
reviews.text: I was a new runner 2 years ago and after much research bought a pair of 1080 v10's.  They immediately reduced the pain I felt when running.  Here I am 1 1/2 years later and in need of a new pair of shoes so I bought these 1080 v12's.  What can I say, they're even better than my v10's.  The only catch was I had to size down 1/2 a size from my normal shoe size.  Once I made that tweak the shoe fit amazingly and I'm off and running again.

reviews.title: Good show, but I can't really run in them...
reviews.text: The fit is right, the sole is not so much right for me.  *For ME* too stiff, too soft, I'm not sure, but the pain set in after a half-mile on a 4 mile run. I had to turn around and cut my run short - my feet hurt.

reviews.title: Comfort - soft foot bed.
reviews.text: 7th or 8th pair - so soft and comfortable for being on your feet for long periods of time.

reviews.title: Great fit
reviews.text: A little reluctant as had always purchased New balance 608 but these fit great and are very comfortable

reviews.title: walking on a cloud comfy
reviews.text:
I was looking for a comfortable all-purpose walking, going to work shoe. NB version 11 has more subdued colors. But they brought me v12 out since they didn't have my sizes left. I was hooked as I tried them on. They are the most comfy shoe I ever used, better than any Nike air, better than the walking co. store orthopedic shoes. These were just super soft. The size is what I usually wear if there is no wide version.

Seem breathable, I got the navy blue with orange trims. I think it looks fine, not into the flashy color. I switch to office shoes when I am in the office.

The only issue is the price is very high. This is my first ever new balance, I always thought they were just another running shoe brand, but man the fresh foam is the most cloud-like soles. I only had it for a few weeks, so not sure how long they will last. I usually wear Merrell an outdoor brand, they don't seem to last very long tho.

title: WONESION Mens Breathable Walking Tennis Running Shoes Blade Fashion Sneakers
features: Rubber sole
UPPER---Fashion mesh upper, soft and breathable. Super breathable upper keeps your feet clean and cool.
INSOLES---The interior of the shoe uses a honeycomb insole that adds cushioning and impact resistance to provide a comfortable feeling for your feet.
OUTSOLES---Blade soles, made of TPU rubber, durable and enhanced non-slip design and make you walk and sports freely on all kinds of ground.
OCCASIONS---Perfect choice for many occasion: Running, training, gym, casual walking, workout, traveling, hiking, camping, climbing, outdoor activities and daily wear.
Stylish color scheme gives you a different visual experience, slip-on closure type easy put on & off. Simple style, all-match colors, can be match any clothing.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

title: Brooks Women’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole

THIS WOMEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely lightweight and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: Wrong size sent/ not size I ordered.
